name: app.anakior/atlas-mind
description: Self-hosted git-native knowledge base with an MCP endpoint your AI reads, writes and rewinds

ATLAS_MCP_URL.description: Host + path (including the token) of your running Atlas Mind instance's MCP endpoint, WITHOUT the leading https:// - minted in Settings -> Tokens in the web UI (or `atlas token create` locally). Example: your-atlas.example.com/mcp/<token>
